{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231701154F00D321971E45DC5B53"}"},"total":691},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7521720674170438424","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，尤其是英灵的设定也非常引人注意。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751292915,"group_id":"7421892080567323673","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不喜欢写多了，但喜欢偷偷懒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwnEqa8b5ovTziGMNflHvF4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4980ac21e06043848c69189dfe236b3e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789576&x-signature=Q2YN%2BxG824BgEcbYJmr%2BNxv6wYM%3D","user_id":"939452897169049","user_name":"遐蝶之恋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"939452897169049","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7421892080567323673","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神】+【镇魂街】+【弥补遗憾/不刀】+【尊重原著/轻改】
曹宇穿越到斩神世界，解锁武神躯，获得神器【十殿阎罗】
守夜人总部为其命名：英灵代理人。
编号000，
在我身前，无数守夜人抛头颅洒热血，镇守大夏。
在我身后，大夏神明轮回，大夏英灵当立。
我大夏诸多英灵，凭什么甘于人后！
在我大夏，人定胜天！！
召唤第一位守护灵。
斗笠，披风，夜冥绝断刀。
虚影对着曹宇单膝跪地。
“末将于禁，愿为曹家世代，赴汤蹈火”
加入守夜人队伍。
拳打鬼面王，脚踢南陀蛇妖，训练营和王面硬碰硬。
解锁许褚，夏侯兄弟，徐晃，张郃。
【战神刑天】【战鬼吕布】【霸王项羽】【仙魔李轩辕】
七条火龙盘踞高天之上，解锁最强形态【炎杀神】
创立特殊小队【镇魂】。
红缨：“不是，曹宇这是什么禁墟？竟然能召唤出大夏英灵”
司小南：“这样的守护灵，他竟然有好几个？”
叶梵感慨：“一人就是一个小队，一人就是一个军团，有曹宇，真是大夏之幸”
【PS：评分是在逐步上涨，进来看一眼再走呗】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/68af2fc999bdca6756f8fd4a4f5890a0","author":"如梦似幻","author_id":"","book_id":"7421892080567323673","book_name":"斩神：守夜人第一镇魂将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7421924454004965913","read_count":"23166","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1272071"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"608","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,都市异能,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92b1151ab90007dac6c70fee33061def~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440475&x-signature=Iruu2cqOQz18832JOCkxl2gzrZ8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"63175276083","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"705"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231701154F00D321971E45DC5B53"}"},"relate_info_list
